title: Full email communication - its here! Beta users needed

posts.author: Ronk (Ron Kimhi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using monday.com as a CRM?

We heard your requests and it’s here - full email communication. We are looking for the first Beta users to try it out and report any issues or ask for enhancements.

Interested? Sign up here: https://forms.monday.com/…/08c7143ddc38b320f74199ee6db9…

emailcommunication1200×630 26.2 KB

Ron

CRM Team

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Already signed up @Ronk - So excited to see this coming to monday.com!

posts.author: anon34162818 (anon34162818)
posts.cookedHtml: Interested but need to know more about what it is exactly? Any additional info available?

posts.author: ReconRooster (thomas mcnally)
posts.cookedHtml: Signed up, how about some details and when will beta begin?

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes quite. Signed up 7 days ago and silence since.
It would be nice to have some reply when this beta will be ready to test.

posts.author: QDagault (Quentin Dagault)
posts.cookedHtml: Can’t find any information concerning this feature. Whats does it exactly do ?

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: @Ronk can you update us all on this feature announcement? Even if it’s just to say something like “Sorry folks, this has been delayed”.

posts.author: ReconRooster (thomas mcnally)
posts.cookedHtml: Emails sent from the app are NOT being received, sent you a separate email. Please let me know,

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Ronk. I havent been contacted yet.
how to try this app??? Monday LabS?

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Ronk for the email about this. I have installed the feature and I am VERY excited about what this will allow us to do, once it’s fully built out. Still a few missing things especially notifications about new emails, but it’s going to turn Monday.com into an even better CRM. Exciting.

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Ronk an update… whenever I come back to the board, I get this message:

posts.author: Yu1992 (Yumi)
posts.cookedHtml: Super interested! Please add me to try out this new feature

posts.author: ReconRooster (thomas mcnally)
posts.cookedHtml: Still not working. Getting a error message when I try to send emails and it goes to the integration page?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @ReconRooster - Perhaps you have an older version of the app. Have you tried uninstalling it and installing it fresh? The latest install link I have is monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
